evals.prompt: 写一个 Python 函数，批量处理 CSV 文件，按指定列分组并计算每组的统计信息（均值、中位数、标准差），结果保存为新的 CSV
evals.expected_output: Pythonic 的 CSV 处理代码，使用 pathlib、dataclass 定义结构、context manager、生成器表达式、类型注解，I/O与逻辑分离，避免常见陷阱如可变默认参数
assertions: Code uses pathlib.Path instead of os.path for file operations
All functions have type annotations on parameters and return types
Statistical result structure uses dataclass or NamedTuple
No mutable default arguments in function signatures
Business logic (computation) is separated from I/O (file read/write) into different functions
Functions are small and focused — each does one thing

evals.prompt: 写一个 Python 类来管理一个带过期时间的缓存，支持 get/set/delete 操作，并能在后台自动清理过期条目
evals.expected_output: 使用 dataclass 实现缓存条目、容器 dunder 方法、asyncio 或 threading 异步清理、类型注解充分、解释设计权衡
assertions: All public methods have type annotations
Cache class implements container dunder methods: __len__ or __contains__ or __getitem__
Background cleanup uses asyncio or threading pattern (not just naive loop)
Cache entry uses dataclass or NamedTuple for structure
Code explains the design tradeoffs (e.g., why async vs thread, why specific data structure)
Invalid input (e.g. negative TTL) raises ValueError with the actual value — never silently reinterprets

evals.prompt: 设计一个 Python 配置管理器，支持从 JSON 文件加载配置、按点号路径访问嵌套配置项（如 'database.host'）、环境变量覆盖、类型安全的配置验证，以及配置变更回调通知
evals.expected_output: 使用 dataclass 定义配置结构、__getitem__ 支持 cfg['database.host']、环境变量覆盖有清晰的优先级文档、验证失败抛出包含具体值的错误信息、变更回调用观察者模式
assertions: Configuration structure uses dataclass or TypedDict — not raw dict
Supports dot-path access to nested config (e.g. cfg.get('database.host'))
Environment variable override is documented with clear priority rules
Validation errors include both the key and the invalid value in the message
Code separates config loading (I/O) from config parsing/validation (logic)
Class implements __getitem__ or __contains__ for idiomatic Python access
